dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.

agents.summary: USD Layer 1 raw call generated from sealed independent workflow.

24h.reason: USD shows a bullish lean due to rising US 2-year yields and moderate 10Y real yield increases despite bearish DXY momentum and risk-on VIX levels. Many inputs are missing, and conflicts between DXY bearish momentum and yield strength reduce conviction. Factor participation is limited, capping confidence at a lean bullish stance.

key_factors: F1 VIX: BEARISH — VIX 15.4, d1 -0.66, d5 -0.34 (Risk-on conditions reduce USD safe-haven demand)
F8 Fed Bias Delta: NEUTRAL — Missing fed_bias (Fed bias change unknown, cannot factor central bank stance)
F5 DXY 5-Day Delta: BEARISH — DXY down 0.41% over 5 days (DXY momentum bearish, indicating weakening USD)
F6 Gold 5-Day Delta: NEUTRAL — Missing input gold_d5_pct (Gold delta unavailable, cannot assess anti-USD pressure)
F2 US 2Y Yield Delta: BULLISH — US 2Y yield up 6 bps over 5 days (Rising 2Y yield signals hawkish Fed expectations and supports USD)
F9 Dollar Smile Regime: NEUTRAL — Insufficient growth and Fed evidence besides VIX (Avoid double-counting risk regime already captured by Factor 1)
F3 US/DE 2Y Spread Delta: NEUTRAL — Missing input us_de_2y_spread_d5_bps (Cannot determine relative yield changes without data)
F4 US 10Y Real Yield Delta: NEUTRAL — US 10Y real yield up 5 bps over 5 days (Rising real yields, but just at threshold; borderline signal)
F7 US Economic Surprise Direction: NEUTRAL — Missing latest_us_event (No recent US data surprise available)
F10 Equity Direction vs USD Correlation Regime: NEUTRAL — Missing equities_regime and nq_d1_pct (Insufficient inputs to assess equity-USD correlation)
